data.content: Branch: feat/foolery-54a2-gemini-interactive (commit 2ac2ac1d). Implements Gemini interactive sessions on shared runtime. Fixes both issues from prior review: (1) take-loop buildSpawnArgs now has Gemini-specific branch, (2) take-child-gemini-spawn.test.ts covers the take-loop spawn path. Also fixes normalizer accumulatedText reset for multi-turn. All quality gates pass: lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2563 tests pass, build succeeds.
